task_name: Add Phase Scanner Broad Scope Review Fixtures
goal: Add Phase Scanner fixtures for wildcard and broad scope review cases and update the coverage map without changing scanner runtime behavior.
claims: BP-038 adds wildcard-scope and broad-scope review fixtures.
BP-038 updates the coverage map so both fixtures are visible and checked.
BP-038 does not change Phase Scanner runtime behavior or external integration behavior.
assumptions: Existing runtime behavior already requires human review for wildcard and broad scope.
The coverage map must be updated in the same block because BP-036 enforces it.
dod: Wildcard-scope review fixture exists and is tested.
Broad-scope review fixture exists and is tested.
Coverage map lists the new fixtures and removes the covered gaps.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-035 documented broad scope and wildcard scope as fixture gaps; BP-036 enforces coverage-map registration.
